query: US spot Bitcoin ETF net flows late June 2026 and early July 2026, weekly trend from Farside Investors and SoSoValue. Are net outflows continuing into the week of June 29-July 3 2026? What is the Bitcoin price trend in late June 2026?
answer:
I've completed the research. Here's a summary of the key findings:

**ETF Flows — Week of June 29–July 3, 2026:** Net outflows **DID continue**, with the week posting **~-$526.6M** — the **8th consecutive weekly outflow** (longest streak in ETF history), pushing the 8-week cumulative outflow above **$8.2B**. However, the daily outflow streak (10 sessions, ~-$2.73B) broke on **July 2** with a **+$221.7M** inflow led by Fidelity's FBTC and ARK's ARKB, while BlackRock's IBIT was the lone holdout still bleeding.

Daily: June 29 -$231M, June 30 -$223M, July 1 -$295M, July 2 +$222M, July 3 holiday.

**Broader trend:** June 2026 was a record monthly outflow (~$4.06B, 73% from IBIT); 2026's May and June daily-outflow streaks drained ~$7.2B combined, flipping YTD flows negative for the first time since the 2024 launch. After the window, inflows partially returned (~$510M over July 2–7) but stayed choppy (July 9 -$186.9M).

**Bitcoin price, late June 2026:** Sharply bearish — BTC fell to **21-month lows near/under $58,000**, with the June 30 close of **$58,559** the quarterly low (~-10% for late June, coinciding with the record outflows). It rebounded in early July: ~$61,700 by July 3, ~$64K by July 6, and ~$63,758 by July 12. The 90-day return was -14.05%.

Note: Minor per-source discrepancies exist on exact daily figures, but the weekly total is consistent at ~-$526–527M.

sources.title: Bitcoin ETFs Post Record Week of Outflows — $8.2B Leaked
sources.snippet: During the shortened holiday week of June 29–July 3, investors withdrew $526.64M. Over the full eight-week streak, total outflows have surpassed $8.2B.

sources.title: U.S. Spot Bitcoin ETFs Record $527M Net Outflows From June 29 to July 2
sources.snippet: ~$527 million in net outflows across four sessions June 29–July 2; July 2 +$223.5M led by FBTC and ARKB broke a 10-day streak.

sources.title: Bitcoin ETF News: Inflows Hit $221M as 10-Day Outflow Streak Ends
sources.snippet: Spot BTC ETFs pulled in $221M on July 3, largest single-day inflow in ~2 months, snapping a 10-day streak that drained $2.73B; BTC rebounded to ~$61,700 after touching 21-month lows under $58,000.

sources.title: Spot Bitcoin ETFs Record $4.06B Monthly Outflows
sources.snippet: Spot Bitcoin ETFs recorded a record $4.06 billion in June outflows; BlackRock IBIT accounted for 73% of June's withdrawals.

sources.title: Bitcoin ETFs Shed $7B Across Two Record Outflow Streaks in 2026
sources.snippet: US spot Bitcoin ETFs logged 10 consecutive outflow sessions in May and 13 in June 2026, draining ~$7.2B and flipping YTD flows negative for the first time since January 2024.

sources.title: Bitcoin ETF Inflows Hit $510M Over 3 Days
sources.snippet: US spot Bitcoin ETFs pulled in ~$510M across three inflow sessions July 2–July 7, ending a 10-day $2.73B outflow streak.

sources.title: Bitcoin ETF Inflows Return As Farside Data Shows Institutions Still Buying The Dip
